things.name: Rhummel Gorge & Suspension Bridges
things.description: City built on a rock plateau with dramatic 200m gorges spanned by seven bridges

things.name: Sidi M'Cid Bridge
things.description: 110m suspension bridge hanging over the gorge - finest in Africa when built in 1912

things.name: Palace of Ahmed Bey
things.description: 1835 Ottoman palace with the finest Algerian tilework, stucco and painted ceilings

things.name: Musee National Cirta
things.description: Algeria's second oldest museum with Numidian royal coins and Roman artefacts

things.name: Emir Abdelkader Mosque
things.description: 1994 mega-mosque with one of Africa's largest domes and a library of Islamic manuscripts

things.name: Old City (El-Qasba)
things.description: Ottoman-era medina with traditional houses, souqs and a Moorish bathhouse

things.name: Timgad Roman Ruins Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage perfectly planned Roman colonial city 110km south

things.name: Djemila Roman Ruins Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Roman city in the mountains

things.name: Cable Car over the Gorge
things.description: Cable car crossing the Rhummel gorge with views of the rock city

things.name: Baghrir Semolina Pancakes
things.description: Algerian thousand-hole pancakes eaten with honey and butter
